verses.1: A Mikhtam of David. Protect me, God, for I take refuge in You.
verses.2: I said to the LORD, “You are my Lord; I have nothing good besides You.”
verses.3: As for the saints who are on the earth, They are the majestic ones; all my delight is in them.
verses.4: The pains of those who have acquired another god will be multiplied; I will not pour out their drink offerings of blood, Nor will I take their names upon my lips.
verses.5: The LORD is the portion of my inheritance and my cup; You support my lot.
verses.6: The measuring lines have fallen for me in pleasant places; Indeed, my inheritance is beautiful to me.
verses.7: I will bless the LORD who has advised me; Indeed, my mind instructs me in the night.
verses.8: I have set the LORD continually before me; Because He is at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
verses.9: Therefore my heart is glad and my glory rejoices; My flesh also will dwell securely.
verses.10: For You will not abandon my soul to Sheol; You will not allow Your Holy One to undergo decay.
verses.11: You will make known to me the way of life; In Your presence is fullness of joy; In Your right hand there are pleasures forever.
